data.description:

data.title: Epstein-Linked Emails Expose Funding Ties to Bitcoin Core Development — Here Is What the Documents Reveal
data.description:
Emails connected to Jeffrey Epstein have unveiled significant funding relationships associated with the development of Bitcoin Core. These documents provide insight into the financial support and connections that exist within the cryptocurrency ecosystem, shedding light on previously undisclosed affiliations and collaborations in the Bitcoin development community. Here is a detailed overview of what the documents reveal about these ties and their implications for the future of Bitcoin and its development landscape.
source: https://blocknews.com/epstein-linked-emails-expose-funding-ties-to-bitcoin-core-development-here-is-what-the-newly-released-documents-reveal/

data.title: Bitcoin Slips Below $95k: 10x Research Maps The Reset While ETF Outflows Bite
data.description:
Bitcoin slipped to a 24-hour low near $94,755 before rebounding toward $96,000, a move that put round-number support back in play and kept focus on whether selling pressure came from leverage, flows, or macro jitters. The drawdown followed a week of weaker closes after early-November levels near $110,000, reinforcing a shift from momentum to repair. […]
